rule.name: Cisco Modify Configuration
rule.description: Modifications to a config that will serve an adversary's impacts or persistence
rule.query:
{
  "keywords": [
    "ip http server",
    "ip https server",
    "kron policy-list",
    "kron occurrence",
    "policy-list",
    "access-list",
    "ip access-group",
    "archive maximum",
    "ntp server"
  ],
  "condition": "keywords"
}
false_positives: Legitimate administrators may run these commands
